THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.title: Plan
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.description: Choose a card in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to it.
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN+.description: Choose 2 cards in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-EXECUTE_PLANS.title: Execute Plans
THEAPPRENTICE-EXECUTE_PLANS.description: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-EXECUTE_PLANS+.description: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS.title: Scrap Plans
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS.description: Discard all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCRAP_PLANS+.description: Discard all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
